title: Tool call read view component with input parameters and output display
purpose: Displays tool call information including input parameters and output results in a structured format with monospace font for file paths.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named ReadView that accepts an AgentToolCallItem prop and renders input parameters in a grid layout followed by an OutputPanel component.

steps.content: Extract input parameters from the tool call item and cast to expected structure.
Build an array of rows containing input parameter labels and values, skipping undefined values.
IF input parameters exist, render them in a grid layout with labels and values.
Extract tool use ID from the item or fall back to the item ID.
Determine the output format based on whether the output is a string.
Render an OutputPanel component with tool use ID, status, stdout, stderr, output, error, and format.
